lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Greetings, [Sir/Madam].

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: The King needs someone to take over the rule of the Kingdom. If I were you, I should consider the position.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Greetings, Your Royal Highness.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Your Royal Highness, I should tell you right away that killing the people of this Kingdom will not make you popular with anyone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How is the Kingdom faring?

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Your subjects are worried about the possibility of war, but they are still happy to work for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What am I meant to be doing again?

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Dealing with all the little troubles that come up from time to time, Your Royal Highness.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Such as the predicament we are now in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Has anything been happening in the kingdom recently?

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Interesting that you should ask that, Your Royal Highness.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: You see, the people are worried that war will break out again.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: King Vargas has found himself with little to do now that you are the regent. He intended, at first, to return to adventuring.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Unfortunately, we still have not had the doors to the throne room enlarged so that he can leave...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, what has he been doing?

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: He has been trying to rule once more, in your absence. However, he has once again quarrelled with the Queen of Etceteria.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: The two of them have been writing letters to each other, threatening to raise armies and declare war on each other once more!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Your Royal Highness, I suggest that you deal with this matter and reconcile the two of them again. Such a quarrel is not good for Miscellania.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't have the time at the moment.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: You are the regent of this kingdom, Your Royal Highness. I would urge you to reconsider.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: However, you are also a busy hero, and thus I understand your reluctance.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Greetings, Your Royal Highness.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Greetings, Thane [Fremennik name].

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Your Royal Highness, I should tell you right away that killing the people of this Kingdom will not make you popular with anyone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How is the Kingdom faring?

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Your subjects are content, your Highness.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Your subjects are content, Thane [Fremennik name].

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Your current approval rating is [number]%. I'm afraid your subjects have not yet collected anything.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Your current approval rating is [number]%. Would you like to collect the resources gathered by your subjects?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Let me check if you have made enough space in your bank, Your Royal Highness.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: I'm afraid you will need [amount] more free space[s] in your bank to hold all the items your subjects have collected.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Here is a list of what your subjects have collected.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: I shall tell your subjects to deliver your resources to your storage right away, Your Royal Highness.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: I shall tell your subjects to deliver your resources to your storage right away, Thane [Fremennik name].

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: This is how your subjects are distributing their effort.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thank you.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Very well, Your Royal Highness.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Very well, Thane [Fremennik name].

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: This is how your subjects are distributing their effort.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I manage the kingdom?

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Your loyal subjects work hard to collect resources for you. Every day they bring what they have collected to the castle. The resources which they collect are coal from the rocks to the north, maple logs from the trees

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: to the east, herbs from the garden just outside the castle, and tuna and swordfish fished at the port to the south. Etceteria has also pledged you teak and mahogany logs from their trees to the north, and seeds

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: from their farm to the south. They are paid from the money in the coffers; each day, one-tenth of the money in the coffers is distributed to them. A maximum of 75k is paid to your subjects and the Etceterians, and the

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: coffers can store up to 7.5 million gp. Another thing which affects the amounts of resources collected is your approval rating. The more your subjects love you, the more they will be motivated to work hard. King Vargas

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: would often go and help out his subjects in their daily tasks, when he was still able to do so, and they loved him dearly for it. Finally, you can choose how much of their efforts your subjects devote to each resource; of

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: course, the harder they work at collecting one, the less time they have to spend collecting the others.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Have you got a copy of my book? It explains everything in more detail.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't...

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Here, you can have this one, I have plenty spare.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What am I meant to be doing again?

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Ruling the Kingdom, Your Royal Highness.

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: Ruling the Kingdom, Thane [Fremennik name].

lines.speaker: Advisor Ghrim
lines.text: And making sure that the king doesn't cause any more trouble.
